query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_agreements` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `investorId` INT NOT NULL,
  `opportunityId` INT NOT NULL,
  `agreementNumber` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `investmentAmount` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `ownershipPercentage` DECIMAL(5,4),
  `profitSharePercentage` DECIMAL(5,2),
  `revenueSharePercentage` DECIMAL(5,2),
  `effectiveDate` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `expirationDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `status` ENUM('draft', 'pending_signature', 'active', 'expired', 'terminated', 'bought_back') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `firewallAcknowledged` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `vetoRightsAcknowledged` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `buybackTerms` TEXT,
  `buybackPrice` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `buybackExercised` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `buybackDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `sunsetDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `sunsetTerms` TEXT,
  `signedByInvestor` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `investorSignatureDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `signedByCompany` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `companySignatureDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `companySignerId` INT,
  `documentUrl` TEXT,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_agreements` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `investorId` INT NOT NULL,
  `opportunityId` INT NOT NULL,
  `agreementNumber` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `investmentAmount` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `ownershipPercentage` DECIMAL(5,4),
  `profitSharePercentage` DECIMAL(5,2),
  `revenueSharePercentage` DECIMAL(5,2),
  `effectiveDate` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `expirationDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `status` ENUM('draft', 'pending_signature', 'active', 'expired', 'terminated', 'bought_back') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `firewallAcknowledged` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `vetoRightsAcknowledged` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  `buybackTerms` TEXT,
  `buybackPrice` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `buybackExercised` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `buybackDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `sunsetDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `sunsetTerms` TEXT,
  `signedByInvestor` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `investorSignatureDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `signedByCompany` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `companySignatureDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `companySignerId` INT,
  `documentUrl` TEXT,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
